name: John Galliano

acts.description: Recorded making violent anti-Semitic statements in a Paris café in 2011, convicted of hate speech
Multiple witnesses reported separate anti-Semitic incidents in Paris

behavior_summary: One of the most gifted fashion designers of his generation, fired by Dior and convicted of hate speech after anti-Semitic tirades were caught on video.

art.summary: Widely considered one of the most technically brilliant and visionary designers of the late 20th and early 21st century. His work for Dior was paradigm-shifting.

accountability_events: 2011 convicted of hate speech in French court
2014 appointed creative director of Maison Margiela

verdict.blurb: He said 'I love Hitler' on video to strangers in a Paris bar. He's back designing clothes and getting standing ovations. The rehabilitation of John Galliano is a lesson in how much the fashion world values talent over anything else.
